title: crataegus × macrocarpa nothovar. hadensis
intro: Crataegus × macrocarpa nothovar. hadensis is a hawthorn cultivar, a hybrid of the Crataegus monogyna and Crataegus laevigata species. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins, which have been shown to have a positive impact on cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crataegus × macrocarpa nothovar. hadensis include lowering blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and enhancing cardiovascular function, making it a valuable herb for heart health. Crataegus × macrocarpa nothovar. hadensis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support cardiovascular well-being.
